name: sim-buddy
description: sim-buddy - WorkBuddy / CodeBuddy marketplace for driving local CAE, CFD, and FEA tools through the sim CLI. This package currently includes COMSOL Multiphysics support.

plugins.name: sim-comsol
plugins.description: COMSOL Multiphysics agent skill for building, solving, inspecting, and reviewing COMSOL models through the sim CLI.
